content: :wave: Hi folks, I am looking on building a simple device driver kernel module that stores state and exposes access to itself through a character device. I have been looking through other ppls implementations of ways to do this, for example https://github.com/metaspace/linux/blob/nvme-rust/samples/rust/rust_chrdev.rs but when I look in the current docs for the kernel crate chrdev is not there, nor is file::Operations. Im wondering what the right approach is in the current kernel crate.
Hey I actually got my q answered!
Yup thats what i found. Thanks for getting back to me though!
jos has marked this topic as resolved.
